ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "security_no" TEXT /* Security number (e.g., customer ID, social security number) */,
  "region_category" INTEGER /* Region category of the customer (0, 1, 2, ...) */,
  "joining_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined */,
  "referral_id" TEXT /* ID of the customer who referred this customer */,
  "last_visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the last visit to the platform */,
  "days_since_last_login" INTEGER /* Number of days since the last login */,
  "avg_time_spent" REAL /* Average time spent by the customer on the platform */,
  "avg_transaction_value" REAL /* Average transaction value of the customer */,
  "avg_frequency_login_days" REAL /* Average frequency of customer logins (in days) */,
  "points_in_wallet" REAL /* Points accumulated by the customer in the loyalty program */,
  "churn_risk_score" INTEGER /* Churn risk score of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Customer email */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer address */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer (F, M, Unknown) */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Description of the gender category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_genders" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer's gender was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "membership_categories" (
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership category */,
  "membership_category" TEXT /* Membership category of the customer (Basic, Gold, No Membership, Platinum, Premium, Silver) */,
  "membership_description" TEXT /* Description of the membership category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_memberships" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "membership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership category */,
  "membership_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer joined the membership */,
  "membership_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer's membership ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "membership_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "preferred_offer_types" (
  "offer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer type */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* Type of offer preferred by the customer (Credit/Debit Card Offers, Gift Vouchers/Coupons, Without Offers) */,
  "offer_description" TEXT /* Description of the offer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_offers" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "offer_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer type */,
  "offer_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer preferred the offer type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "offer_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medium_of_operations" (
  "medium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medium of operation */,
  "medium_of_operation" TEXT /* Medium of operation used by the customer (Both, Desktop, Smartphone) */,
  "medium_description" TEXT /* Description of the medium of operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_mediums" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "medium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medium of operation */,
  "medium_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer used the medium of operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "medium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internet_options" (
  "internet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internet option */,
  "internet_option" TEXT /* Internet option used by the customer (Fiber Optic, Mobile Data, Wi-Fi) */,
  "internet_description" TEXT /* Description of the internet option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("internet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_internet_options" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "internet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each internet option */,
  "internet_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer used the internet option */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id", "internet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "churn_predictions" (
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "churn_prediction" TEXT /* Churn prediction for the customer (Yes/No) */,
  "churn_probability" REAL /* Probability of the customer churning */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaints" (
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "complaint_date" TEXT /* Date when the complaint was made */,
  "complaint_description" TEXT /* Description of the complaint */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complaint_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaints_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "complaint_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution */,
  "complaint_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complaint */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the resolution was made */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_complaint_resolutions_complaint_id FOREIGN KEY ("complaint_id") REFERENCES complaints ("complaint_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "customer_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was given */,
  "feedback_description" TEXT /* Description of the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
